name: Codestral 25.01
metaDescription: Codestral 25.01 (Mistral AI), released 2025-01 — part of the Codestral line. ~2x faster generation, 80+ languages, 256k context (codestral-2501).
overview: Codestral 25.01 is a large language model from Mistral AI, part of the Codestral line. Released 2025-01. Code-completion / fill-in-the-middle line covering 80+ languages.
What's notable in this version: ~2x faster generation, 80+ languages, 256k context (codestral-2501).
